channel.title: Nicotine Science and Policy
channel.description: Daily digest of views, debates and discussions on nicotine science, policy, regulation and advocacy.

item.title: PROHIBITION: WHAT LIES BENEATH? | THR Unfiltered
item.description: Prohibition often looks clean on the surface: ban the product, remove the problem. Beneath it sits a messier reality — demand, dependence, informal supply and people pushed further from safer choices. In tobacco and nicotine policy, bans can make harm harder to see rather than easier to reduce. The question is not whether prohibition sounds strong, but what it leaves behind when the headlines fade. (Published on July 17, 2026bygfn.tv)
